metadata.description: Hoopit agent skills, distributed as Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: hoopit-onboarding
plugins.description: Take a fresh machine to a working hoopit/api or hoopit/flutter-app checkout, plus the supporting CLIs.

plugins.name: hoopit-dev
plugins.description: Day-to-day dev workflows and CLIs: Jira/Sentry issues, PR review, Atlassian, CircleCI.

plugins.name: hoopit-product
plugins.description: Product work: stress-test plans and ideas against the domain model, sharpen terminology, and produce a PRD.

plugins.name: hoopit-matt-picks
plugins.description: Curated picks from mattpocock/skills, tracking upstream.
